final:
module RefModule(  
    input clk,  
    input rst,  
    input en,  
    output reg [4-1:1-1] count  
);  
    always @(posedge clk or posedge rst) begin  
        if (rst) begin  
            count <= 4'b0000;  
        end else if (en) begin  
            count <= count + 1;  
        end  
    end  
endmodule
